name: Apple Cinnamon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the oat bran cereal, brown sugar, cinnamon, and baking powder.
2. In another bowl or blender, whisk together the skim milk, frozen apple juice concentrate, egg whites, and vegetable oil until well combined.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just mixed.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts (if using) and apples.
5. Divide the batter evenly among prepared muffin cups sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
6. Bake at 400°F for 15-17 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Serve warm.
